net.java.dev.jna:jna.reason: Upstream declares JNA as LGPL-2.1-or-later or Apache License 2.0. This project uses the Apache 2.0 option for JNA.

net.java.dev.jna:jna-platform.reason: Upstream declares JNA as LGPL-2.1-or-later or Apache License 2.0. This project uses the Apache 2.0 option for the JNA platform artifact as well.
